content.text: This is the same spark-skew stage as before — the state should already persist in the cluster from earlier. Let me verify current status.

input.command:
echo "=== Jobs in spark-skew ===" && kubectl get jobs -n spark-skew
echo "=== Pods ===" && kubectl get pods -n spark-skew
